spell.forcemaster_rpg.stonehand.name: Stonehand
spell.forcemaster_rpg.stonehand.descript: Gives the caster the Stonehand Effect for {effect_duration} seconds. Knuckle attacks have a 10% chance to stun targets.
spell.forcemaster_rpg.asal.name: Asalraalaikum
spell.forcemaster_rpg.asal.description: A devastating charged punch that deals {damage_1} soul damage and {damage_2} physical damage. Makes the target more vulnerable to soul damage and exhausts the caster.
spell.forcemaster_rpg.barq_esna.name: Baraqijal Esna
spell.forcemaster_rpg.barq_esna.descript: Makes a target more vulnerable to soul damage, weakens their attack, and increases your critical hit chance against them.
spell.forcemaster_rpg.burstcrack.name: Burst Crack
spell.forcemaster_rpg.burstcrack.descrip: Smashes the ground hard, dealing {damage} physical damage and knocking targets up. The caster gets 5 levels of Soul Overflow instantly.
spell.forcemaster_rpg.belial_smashing.de: Charges in a direction, knocking targets up and dealing {damage_1} arcane and {damage_2} physical damage.
spell.forcemaster_rpg.sonichand.name: Sonichand
spell.forcemaster_rpg.sonichand.descript: Continuously punches the air, creating a vacuum that deals {damage_1} soul and {damage_2} physical damage. The caster gets a level of Soul Overflow per hit, up to 3 levels.
spell.forcemaster_rpg.arcane_blast.name: Arcane Blast
spell.forcemaster_rpg.arcane_blast.descr: Charges up blasts that pierce through {pierce} targets and deal {damage} arcane damage.
